title: Quantified Outcomes and Transformation Proof
summary: Measured impact across sales, audience growth, customer scale, delivery efficiency, and enterprise transformation.
body:
Joz's skills should be supported with outcome evidence rather than capability lists alone.

Verified CV-level outcome claims include:

- 20× digital sales growth within 12 months for Maybank–Ageas Etiqa through conversational and machine-learning UX.
- 30× monthly active audience growth at Mediacorp through mobile-first transformation.
- 70% reduction in agency-wide design-to-engineering handoff friction at Leo Burnett/Publicis through code-based prototyping.
- Engineering and EU accessibility work serving more than 16 million Erste customers.
- More than 3,000 wealth pilots and ML models for high-net-worth and mass-market banking and insurance contexts.

When answering, avoid stacking every metric into one paragraph. Select the two or three most relevant proof points for the recruiter's question.

claims: Joz's career includes measurable growth, delivery-efficiency, adoption, and enterprise-scale outcomes.
Metrics should be used selectively and tied to the relevant company and context.
The strongest recurring pattern is transformation of complex systems into higher adoption and business performance.
proof_points: 20× digital sales growth within 12 months at Maybank–Ageas Etiqa.
30× monthly active audience growth at Mediacorp.
70% reduction in agency-wide handoff friction at Leo Burnett/Publicis.
Engineering and accessibility impact across services used by 16M+ Erste customers.
Interaction and product work spanning hundreds of millions of cumulative users across the career.
